sqlMap.select: SELECT HREF FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #docId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT ATTACHFILESN, ATTACHFILEHREF FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #docId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT CHANGESN, URL FROM TBL_HISTORYDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #docId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT ATTACHFILESN, MODIFYSN, ATTACHFILEHREF FROM TBL_HISTORYATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #docId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO SET HREF = #href# WHERE DOCID = #docId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_ENDATTACHINFO SET ATTACHFILEHREF = #href# WHERE DOCID = #docId# AND ATTACHFILESN = #attachFileSN# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

UPDATE TBL_APRATTACHINFO SET ATTACHFILEHREF = #href# WHERE TBL_APRATTACHINFO.DOCID IN ( SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE ORGDOCID = #docId# AND COMPANYID = TBL_APRATTACHINFO.COMPANYID AND TENANT_ID = TBL_APRATTACHINFO.TENANT_ID ) AND TBL_APRATTACHINFO.ATTACHFILESN = #attachFileSN# AND TBL_APRATTACHINFO.COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TBL_APRATTACHINFO.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_HISTORYDOCINFO SET URL = #url# WHERE DOCID = #docId# AND CHANGESN = #changeSN# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_HISTORYATTACHINFO SET ATTACHFILEHREF = #href# WHERE DOCID = #docId# AND ATTACHFILESN = #attachFileSN# AND MODIFYSN = #modifySN# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
